characters.name: Ally Fraser
characters.description: Ally Fraser (Bill Patterson) was a man thatDenniswas in debt to. Dennis mentioned the magnificent seven to him, as he went to see him and ask for Thornley Manor to be done up, due to Dennis singing his praises of them towards Ally. Oz entered his offices, and knocks out his 'heavy' to attempt to protect Dennis.Nevillesees him as a corrupt businessman, however Dennis informs him that they must take work wherever they can get it. Ally wanted the group to cut corners on Thornley Manor, with renovating it into a care home. With persuasion from Neville, Dennis went to see Ally to ask that they did not cut the corners and that everything was done by the book. Ally later sent the lads to Spain to do up a pool on his holiday home. Dennis went to the UK with some money of Ally's as he then practically entrapped him in Spain. Ally gave everyone a day off for Barry andHazelswedding. The seven accompanied byBrendaand Hazel later escaped Ally by boat as Hazel believed that they were only getting married on the boat.

characters.name: Angel
characters.description: Angel (Juan Maria Almonte) was potentially an embassy official. It was most probably her that had got the lads the job doing up the ambassadors home in Havana. She may have overseen proceedings once or twice before this too. She probably later informed them thatNevillehad been kidnapped asOz,Dennis, andBomberwent to rescue him. She probably farewelled them all off from Cuba upon the renovations on the ambassadors house being complete, andBarrybeing free from prison, and Neville now free of his kidnappers.

characters.name: Arthur Pringle
characters.description: Arthur Pringle (Bryan Pringle) was a snobbish, grumpy landlord of the lads' local when they were staying in Derbyshire, to renovate Thornley Manor. He was often irritated by the lads, especiallyOzandWayne. He had a daughter namedCarolewhom Wayne seduced and as punishment, he banned Wayne and the rest of the lads from his pub. it was later revealed that he once attended a sex party hosted byKenny Ames, this was the source of the lads blackmailing of Arthur to lift the ban. Wayne got his car taken away from him at Thornley Manor due to it having a numberplate from Düsseldorf, it was later revealed that Arthur was the one that reported this. The day before the magnificent seven left for Spain, the lads called Arthur. Arthur was angered at this, as he felt he would be rid of them at last. The lads then managed to get him to walk to his front door over the phone, he is greeted by a wall the other side of the door. The lads then begin to sing a parody of 'we'll meet again' by Dame Vera Lynn, however their own version was titled 'wall meet again', which was an idea to annoy Pringle one final time before they left.

characters.name: Barry
characters.description: Barry Barry Spencer Taylor (Timothy Spall) Barry is a bashful, boring, bumbling electrician from the West Midlands. He has a large vocabulary and is well-read. In the first series rides a Triumph motorbike. Initially it is never made clear as to which part of the West Midlands he actually comes from (though later in the third series he claims to have been born in Birmingham) but Barry mentions connections with West Bromwich and Wolverhampton. He is a season ticket holder at Wolverhampton Wanderers while he has an account at the West Bromwich & District Building Society. His tendency to rabbit on and be 'boring' as well as to look on the bleak side of things are mocked by his mates, but they retain some affection for him. Barry is a bashful, boring, bumbling electrician from the West Midlands. He has a large vocabulary and is well-read. In the first series rides a Triumph motorbike. Initially it is never made clear as to which part of the West Midlands he actually comes from (though later in the third series he claims to have been born in Birmingham) but Barry mentions connections with West Bromwich and Wolverhampton. He is a season ticket holder at Wolverhampton Wanderers while he has an account at the West Bromwich & District Building Society. His tendency to rabbit on and be 'boring' as well as to look on the bleak side of things are mocked by his mates, but they retain some affection for him. In the opening episode it is revealed that he previously worked withDenniswhen he recognises him while they are registering for the agency in the Netherlands. He initially goes to work in Mönchengladbach but later in the first episode arrives on the Düsseldorf site, claiming he "didn't like the place nor the site." He ends up staying in the same hut as the rest of the group.  Barry quickly irks some of the lads with his obsession on the hut requiring a "leader", with Dennis unintentionally acquiring this role. Throughout the series, he constantly reminds Dennis of his seniority. While his various lectures on the lifestyle the group leads, as well as stories about his family members never fail to bewilder the rest of the lads. In Germany, Barry is shown to be closest toMoxey, as both of them are considered to be boring by Oz and to a lesser extent Dennis. Barry and Moxey both take an interest in outside activities, such as gardening, and attempting to live a healthier lifestyle by avoiding fatty foods and lowering their alcohol intake, though this proves unsuccessful when Moxey can't resist ordering a beer.  Later, while Barry and Moxey attempt to get a suntan during a spell of warm weather they are roped into a scheme to smuggle pornographic videos back into England by Oz. Barry is reluctant, though is quickly brought round when he discovers Oz's contact owns a solarium. Barry's enthusiasm doesn't last long as Moxey forgets to wake him while he is asleep under a sun lamp, resulting in a very red face and much hilarity from the rest of the lads. Barry also

characters.name: Bartender
characters.description: Bartender (Ray Knight) was the bartender of a pub in Germany. The bartender was a minor character in  the first series of the show. Bartender was seen in every episode, often serving the lads beer most probably, and maybe listening in on their conversations during the first series.

characters.name: Big Baz
characters.description: Big Baz (Yin Tong John) wasAlly Fraser'sminder. Big Baz was often acting as Ally's main 'heavy' in his office. In the office he was knocked out for a short while byOz. Later when the lads go on strike, Ally called his heavies onto Thornley Manor, Big Baz goes forBarry. Barry could not fight him, howeverBomberorMoxeyleapt over their car and later ended up kicking the man in the face, and knocking him out. Bomber also broke his nose and his hand.

characters.name: Bomber
characters.description: Bomber Brian "Bomber" Busbridge (Pat Roach) Bomber is a mild-mannered 6'5" West Country brickie. He his heavily built with a bushy beard and incredible strength. He is married toPatsyand has five children, including his daughtersTracyandKathy. Bomber is a mild-mannered 6'5" West Country brickie. He his heavily built with a bushy beard and incredible strength. He is married toPatsyand has five children, including his daughtersTracyandKathy.
characters.personality_section: Bomber is a mild-mannered 6'5" West Country brickie. He his heavily built with a bushy beard and incredible strength. He is married toPatsyand has five children, including his daughtersTracyandKathy.

He is married toPatsyand has five children, including his daughtersTracyandKathy.
characters.personality_section: Bomber is a mild-mannered 6'5" West Country brickie. He his heavily built with a bushy beard and incredible strength. He is married toPatsyand has five children, including his daughtersTracyandKathy.

characters.name: Brenda Hope
characters.description: Brenda (Julia Tobin) was the wife ofNeville. She briefly appeared farewelling him and greeting him back home from Düsseldorf most probably. Brenda and Neville had a strong marriage, as on weekends during the Thornley Manor Renovations he would go home to see her. She seemed to do most of the cooking and caring for their daughter along with working as a nurse. They roleplayed and nearly had sex one evening, but were halted by the appearence ofBarry, 'stating that's why I couldn't get through, you phone was off of the landline.'Wayneconfided in the pair due to his issues withChrista. Barry confided in them about the fact thatHazelfound him 'boring' as he only ever spoke of what he did with the lads. Neville also took Brenda to Spain duringAlly FraserandVickie'spool renovation. She later attended Barry and Hazels wedding and escaped Ally Fraser by boat. By the 2000s the pair were running their own business. Neville is in the midst of a mid life crisis as he had sexual fantasies over his secretaryLorraine. He felt as if the pairs marriage may not be as strong as he and all of the lads had thought after all.

characters.name: Carole Pringle
characters.description: Carole Pringle (Catherine Rabbet) was the daughter ofArthur Pringle. The one notable event that she was a part of wasWaynemaking an attempt to seduce her. Due to Wayne's attempts at seduction and the fact that he had slept with her, Arthur took a bad reaction to this, so he therefore made the decision to ban all of the lads from his pub, which doubled up as their living arrangements every now and then, he later lifted the ban after they blackmailed him after finding out he attended a sex party hosted byKenny Ames. Like many of Wayne's conquests she only lasted one episode in the second series.

characters.name: Chem
characters.description: Chem (Lutfi Oguz) was one of the Turks on the building site in Düsseldorf. Chem informedKamalthat he should not attackOzafter he found out he andUlihad been seeing one another behind his back as he was a pufta. When Kamal later chased Oz around the building site to attack him and heeded Chem's warnings not to do so, Chem and the Turks save Oz from Kamal, as it seemed that they had seen passed his xenophobia towards them at last.

characters.name: Chip Saugus
characters.description: Chip (Jon Proudstar) was the son ofJoe Saugus.Chip was a steelworksman on a construction site in Las Vegas.Oz,Dennis, andNevillego to see him atop a scaffold. Chip noticed him as the man who tried to get the rednecksTravis&Quinceout of a bar prior to this meeting, and he liked the seems of the man. Oz talked to him and realised that the Native Americans had the same troubles as the British at heart. It is later revealed that Chip is in on being the scaffolder for the Middlesborough Transporter Bridges move to the Grand Canyon, afterBarryfinishes a phone call to Dennis. Chip got to the Grand Canyon site the next day, prepared to start working. His dad was happy to see his son as it seemed he had not seen him for a long while, as Joe remarked, 'it'll do wonders for our relationship.'

characters.name: Chrissy
characters.description: Chrissy (Sandra James-Young) was the mother ofWyman. She was also a woman thatWaynehad a one night stand with, off screen, she called Wayne to inform him that she was pregnant with their son Wyman in the series two episodeMarjorie doesn't live here anymore. By Series fourDennisstarts up a relationship with her after meeting her before he went to work in Cuba, making Wyman become uneasy, yet see him in the light of a father figure. She writes a letter to Cuba saying that she is going there to see Dennis and her son Wyman, as the lads time that they saw one another was before they had left for Cuba. Wyman noticed the handwriting to be his mothers as when Dennis informs him of what the letter said and who it was from Wyman had stated that it had looked like his mothers handwriting. She later went to Cuba. She sees that Dennis is nervous around her during Wyman being at a magic show, and particpating in a trick where her son was sawed in half. She visitedBarrywhilst he was imprisoned in Havana. She spent time alone with Dennis the same day that she visited Barry, and revealed that she helpedOzwrite his note toOfelia Ortiz, thatMoxeyultimately gave Ofelia. Dennis later spends the night with her, then he goes over a balcony to see someone get bundled into a car and kidnapped, he does not realise that this person being kidnapped isNevilleas he returns inside to spend the night with Chrissy. She may have ended things for a time during the final episode of the fourth series. She is seen at the end of Au Revoir, Pet  or during the second part of the episode elsewhere where Wyman and Moxey were in a shopping centre or when the lads andTarquin Pearcewent to inform the police of Barry's kidnap at the hands of Guerrilla fighters. It is unclear whether she is still or back with Dennis at the end of Au Revoir, Pet part two.

characters.name: Christa
characters.description: Christa was a minor but important character in Auf Wiederehen, Pet who was initially an object of lust for the men on the building site but eventually became the one true love of ladies manWayne. She is played byLysette Anthony. Christa first appears in the episode Love and Other Four Letter Words as the new typist at the office and the men are struck by her beauty. She is shown to be sweet natured and rather innocent but occassionally with a naughty glint in her eye.Ozhas had an erotic dream about a woman called Yvette the night before and a misunderstanding leads him to think Christa is called Yvette and therefore must be the woman in his dream. He andBarryconclude that he has known her from a past life and they are destined to be together so he buys her flowers expressing his undying love. On finding out her real name he takes the flowers back humiliated. Womanizing Wayne who initially saw her as a possible conquest quickly becomes bessoted with her and buys the flowers from Oz - not knowing they who he'd bought them for - and gives them to Christa declaring his love for her. When he approaches Christa she asks to see his living quarters and a jealous Oz follows them. Christa screams when she sees a rat and upon hearing her scream Oz thinks sex mad Wayne has gone too far with her and throws him out the hut. Touched by Wayne's embarassment Christa agrees to go on a date with him but won't let anything sexual happen between them. Wayne confides inDennishe's embarassed to have fallen for her as he never thought he would want a long-term relationship. In the next episode When The Boat Goes out Christa and Wayne appear to have started a romance much to the chagrin of some of the German workers who do not approve of Christa andDagmardating English men rather than them. Even though most of the other builders leave Germany Wayne decides to stay to be with her. Christa does not appear in series 2 however she is frequently mentioned. We find out that Wayne and Christa married and she moved to England to be with him however the marriage broke down and Christa moved back to Germany due to Wayne's infidelities. Despite this they do still appear to love each other as Wayne describes her as his one true love and mentions that she told him she would still want to be with him if he grew up. In the episode Marjorie Doesn't Live Here Anymore Christa phones Wayne to tell him that she is pregnant with his child and eventually decides she will have the baby who she will raise as a single mother. Wayne confides inBrendathat he does love Christa but is not capable of fidelity.

characters.name: Christine Chadwick
characters.description: Christine Patterson (Madelaine Newton) was Dennis' second wife. She was his wife after he broke up withDagmarwhilst Dennis began work on Thornley Manor. Dennis would leave Thornley Manor on weekends to see Christine, and whenever there were riples or issues between the two he would stay with his sisterNormafor the weekend. She was not seen again after Dennis and the lads went to Spain to do up the pool inAlly Fraser'svilla that he and his wifeVickiewanted done up.

characters.name: Colin Latham
characters.description: Colin Latham (Ray Winstone) was a soldier who went on the run following a rough time with some of his fellow soldiers. He met the Lads when they visited the Country in Germany, and he went to work with them in Düsseldorf.  They planned to have a darts match against him and his soldiers, and bought heaps of beer in preparation for the match. Most of the beer was drank byMagowanhowever, whoOzwanted in the hut due to his great darts playing skills and high chance of winning them the darts match.DennisandNevillelater persuaded him to return to the army, and he remained in touch with Neville via letters.

characters.name: Colleen
characters.description: Colleen (Kristy Munden) was the Native American woman who was pregnant.Moxeyhid out in the space that she was at as theMedicine Manwas sat on a rocking chair outside. Moxey hid under the table as she was about to give birth, he asked if she could wait a bit, however he knew should couldn't. Moxey runs outside yelling, 'she 's 'avin a baby and I don't know how to deliver it and seesAndy Hateleybut he no longer cared about the risk that he was taking here, his main priority was Colleen giving birth. Either Hateley and Moxey delivered the baby before they spoke in the next room over, or the medicine man delivered the baby as Moxey and Hateley spoke in the room next door.

characters.name: D.I. Andy Hateley
characters.description: Andy Hateley (Richard Ridings) was a british policeman and Detective Inspector who arrived in Arizona afterDennisreturned back from a meeting withJeffery Grainger. Andy posed as a tourist who wanted to see the Grand Canyon which was where the lads were attempting to move the Middlesborough Transporter Bridge to, but struggled to do this as the core of the bridge was missing. Andy reached the site and asked forMoxeyas he properly introduces himself and the lads cover for Moxey thus showing a solidarity of sorts that their bond over the years had developed, nurtured, and grown.Barrypleaded for him to arrest him due toKadiplanting drugs on him, however later in a bar he informed Barry that Kadi had been arrested. He later arrestedQuince&Travistwo locals that Oz had fallen ill of a short while after arriving in Arizona, who may had in revenge later off-roadedWymanthe previous day, before their arrest. When Hately arrested them they seemed to have wanted to have something out with Wyman once again. Moxey was hiding at the house of a pregnant woman namedColleenas he ran out to find Andy and yells 'she's 'avin a baby and I don't know how to deliver it!' After Andy delivered the baby, or brought the ArizonanMedicine Manin to do this task and took Moxey to another room in Colleens house to talk to him potentially. Moxey fears he is being arrested as he assures him he is not arresting him, he was merely there to inform him that he no longer had a criminal record, and was the talk of the police station back in Liverpool as he uncovered half of the information that ultimately nailedMickey Startup. He informed Andy that he did not killTeddy Platt, some workers working on moving the Middlesborough Transporter Bridge did that and saved him, as Teddy was on the verge of killing him. Jeffery Grainger had smoked some of the drugs that Kadi planted on Barry in Native America as he confessed to all of his crimes, including stealing the core of the bridge in broad daylight. The lads informed him that Andy had heard it all, and because they were both Brits he was within his durastiction to arrest Jeffery and take him back to prison in Britain.

characters.name: D.S Flint
characters.description: Detective Sergeant Flint (Ian Curtis) was a character who often appeared in the third series. He was investigatingMickey Startup. He may have also been investigation his hitmanTeddy Platt. It's highly plausible that it was him who had the idea ofMoxeyspying on startup. Moxey may have reported back each of his findings to him, and given him the most part of the evidence that he uncovered whilst being an undercover ex-con.

characters.name: Dagmar
characters.description: Dagmar (Brigette Kahn) wasDennis' German girlfriend originally from Düsseldorf. Dennis began to date her whilst he was still married to his first wifeVera Patterson. He most probably took her back to Britain with him after he left Germany, and divorced Vera Patterson. Dennis originally considered staying in Germany with the site receptionist however ultimately decided against this. It is likely that she returned to Germany upon leaving Dennis after Dennis found his second wifeChristine Patterson, whom he had some argues and ripples with so whenever that happened he had to stay with his sisterNorma.

characters.name: Dawn
characters.description: Dawn (Misty Upham) was a nurse in Native America.Wymanhad gone missing andJoe Saugus,Dennis, andOzcould not locate him. Joe decided that they should all call of the search until the next morning. The next morning Oz manages to locate a bloody Wyman who seemed to have been beaten up. Oz and the lads knew what they needed to do, as they took him to hospital. Dawn cand out of the hospital and had discharged Wyman informing Oz and the lads that he should have been alright, as he was only dehydrated with a mild concussion, as to which he was. The above may have happened after he walked away from his car after being off roaded byTravis&Quincea day earlier.

characters.name: Debbie Hope
characters.description: Debbie (Catherine Whately) was the young daughter ofNevilleandBrenda. Brenda worked as a nurse before Neville went to Derbyshire. He had trouble caring for their daughter at points in time. Neville struggled to cook, as Brenda asked him one night what he and Debbie were having for supper, he replied something along the lines of not much. He meant something that wouldn't take long to cook, or would not be too hard to cook. Brenda later wenr to Spain with Debbie, Neville, and the lads as they were renovating the pool and actually creating its foundation atAlly FraserandVickie'spool at their villa which was located in Spain. By the 2000s Debbie (Danielle Davison) could be working with Neville and Brenda on their new business venture of creating their own company. Debbie was now an adult by this point. She may later show up again on a holiday with Neville and Brenda a couple of years later, she may have also been present when he was recruited by British Intelligence. She may have also gone to Cuba potentially with Neville and the lads.

characters.name: Dennis
characters.description: Dennis Patterson Dennis "Den" Patterson (Tim Healy) Dennis, whether he likes it or not, was co-opted as the leader of the British workers on the German construction site, who are nicknamed the "Magnificent Seven". It is he who brings his matesNevilleandOztogether to Germany, having worked there before. It is revealed that Dennis has a fear of heights. Dennis, whether he likes it or not, was co-opted as the leader of the British workers on the German construction site, who are nicknamed the "Magnificent Seven". It is he who brings his matesNevilleandOztogether to Germany, having worked there before. It is revealed that Dennis has a fear of heights.

It is he who brings his matesNevilleandOztogether to Germany, having worked there before. It is revealed that Dennis has a fear of heights.

It is he who brings his matesNevilleandOztogether to Germany, having worked there before. It is revealed that Dennis has a fear of heights. It is he who brings his matesNevilleandOztogether to Germany, having worked there before. It is revealed that Dennis has a fear of heights.

It is he who brings his matesNevilleandOztogether to Germany, having worked there before. It is revealed that Dennis has a fear of heights.

characters.name: Dhori
characters.description: Dhori (Aleksander Mikic) was the brother of a woman namedIrena. He may or may not have been in Middlesborough to attempt to free her from the brothel. Dhori was part of the black labour thatOzand the lads were using to demolish the Middlesborough transporter bridge only to sell it off to someone else who may want to buy it, which ultimately came at the hands ofJoe Saugus, as the bridge was moved to Arizona to be placed over the Grand Canyon to avoid Arizonans having to loop around a giant highway to reach their casinos.Nicki Mylesalso wanted to research using black labour for work in British areas and was nearly led straight to it byNevillepurely because he found her attractive, whilst in the midst of a mid-life crisis.

characters.name: Douglas
characters.description: Douglas (Donald McBride) was a man within the couple that had moved into Marjorie's old flat in the episodeMarjorie doesn't live here anymore. Douglas was sat on the couch with his wifeJean, asOz, andMoxeycame into the house. He asked Oz how the he and Moxey had got, with Oz informing him that he had a spare key, as he and his ex wife by that point Marjorie had lived there. Douglas informed Oz that Marjorie no longer lives there and has moved out.Barrylater headed for the house after making it to Newcastle later than the other lads. Barry knocked on the door and as Jean answered it, she informed Barry that Marjorie has moved away from that house. Barry says that he has nowhere to stay as Douglas practically tells him that he isn't staying there as he throws him and his bags out of the door. Barry then goes and stays withNevilleandBrendalike Wayne had done. As Oz, Bomber, and Moxey all went to stay withDennis,Christine, andNorma.

characters.name: Elena
characters.description: Elena (Joanne Good) wasMoxey'sAustralian girlfriend during the series 5 special. Moxey originally met her on an embassy job in Laos as the lads were still working under the embassy. By the end of the special, Moxey moves away to Australia in order to be with Elena and to live with her. Elena may have also been at the meal where a toast was drank toBomber. She may have spent time with Moxey between series 4 and the special. It is possible that she was in the store withWymanand Moxey too. If Moxey retained his interest for training and racing hamsters, it is possible that Elena shared this interest with him.

characters.name: Erica Trasker
characters.description: Erica Trasker (Alison King) was the wife ofEvan Trasker. She is only seen on screen in one episode, and only mentioned in the episode which is Our Men In Havana. She is never seen or mentioned in any episode again after this second episode of the fourth series. She was most probably sent home from Havana byTarquin Pearcealong with her husband Evan Trasker afterNevillehad reported him and the lads having trouble with Evan Trasker whilst they worked with him as their gaffer. Subsequently a man namedGary Turnbullbecame the lads' new gaffer after the Traskers were sent home and was often helped and aided in his new role byDennis.

characters.name: Evan Trasker
characters.description: Evan Trasker (Simon Kunz) was the gaffer of the lads' first embassy job in Havana. Trasker had a wife namedErica Trasker. Most of the lads did not get on well with Trasker, and afterNeville'snew spy handlerTarquin Pearcefound out about this he sent Trasker home. After Trasker was sent homeGary Turnbulltook charge of finding work for the lads, as he frequently askedDenniswhether the lads would be willing to take jobs or not, as he was the new gaffer.  Dennis would often agree to any sort of work that came their way for all of the lads. Dennis and Gary also would go through work documents like the inventory of the ambassador of Havana's home refurbishment together too.

characters.name: Felipe
characters.description: Felipe (Sergio Carlo) was an associate ofTarquin Pearce, Tarquin informsNevilleafter he gives him a retrieval mission ofMichael Goy'sphone SIM card the fact that, 'You don't know him, but he knows you!' Felipe waits in a truck beneath Michael Goy's home, however Neville fails to retrieve it at his home. He goes to a bar with Michael and his friends as he manages to get the SIM card.Moxeyneeded the toilet so he asked Neville to look after his Guinea pig Zemo as he went to to the toilet. Neville went out to see Felipe as he placed the SIM card in what seemed like it were a master computer in his truck. He downloaded everything off of the SIM card, as he asked Neville what was in the box. Neville informed him that it did not matter. Neville then goes back in and gives Zemo back to Moxey and reinstalls the SIM card into Michaels phone after he gives him his to book him, Neville, and three others friends in at a restraunt. As Michael calls the restraunt on Neville's phone which is of the exact same make, he reinstalls the SIM into Michael's phone. Later Tarquin informs Neville that Felipe had made a copy of some drugs that he is to use to knock out Michael at his home. Neville gets to Michael's house as he is knocked out, he fails the mission however as he falls asleep at Michael's home. Neville is then woken up by Michael as he leaves his house afterwards. Felipe could have then met him outside and been the man who forcibly bundled him into a car and kidnapped him.

characters.name: Foreman
characters.description: The Foreman (Jimmy Rushton) appeared in the factory thatMarjorieworked at.Sandromay have asked the foreman to inform Marjorie thatOzwas back and he seemed as if he had wanted to see their (Marjorie and Oz's) sonRodney. The foreman left and was never seen again soon after.

characters.name: Gary Hathaway
characters.description: Gary Hathaway (Corey Johnson) was a man who appeared in a Native American prison. The lads reached Native America however they got followed by the DEA.Kadihad planted drugs onBarrybefore he and the lads went on a plane with most of the Middlesborough Transporter Bridge andJoe Saugus. The DEA caught them at a villa as they ask them all to put their hands atop of their heads, then to lie down doing the same thing, when Barry tries he falls off of the diving board and into the pool. The DEA arrested all of the lads for drug trafficking as Gary Hathaway met the lads within a prison. Gary managed to get the lads bail so that they could begin work in Native America on placing  the bridge over the Grand Canyon, so that way the Native Americans did not have to loop around a giant highway to get to their casinos any longer.

characters.name: Gary Turnbull
characters.description: Gary Turnbull Gary Turnbull (Clive Russell) was man who gave work assignments within the British Embassy. Gary Turnbull wanted the troubles withEvan Traskerand the lads having their issues and difficulties with him, to be over quite quickly. He seemed to take over Traskers role due to this, asDennisand the lads got on far better with him it had seemed. Gary Turnbull asked the Dennis if he and the lads could collect a bath tub one Saturday, Dennis agreed for them all. An argument came about as the lads were worried it would occur during the evening that many of them had plans for, asOzwas going to seeOfelia Ortizin a ballet show,Wymanwas going snorkelling with the british embassy workforce, andNevillewas on a mission thatTarquin Pearceassigned him. Dennis assured the lads that they would be back by the evening, and it was a daytime job. He informed them that by that point they had to take any sort of work that they could be get and be grateful for it. The work that was being completed on a house refurbishment was being done too slowly so Gary warned Dennis that they had to speed up their work processes or they could see themselves fired and a new team of workers bought in. Gary and Dennis go through the inventory and then they later found out that Oz,Bomber, andBarryhad been moonlighting the old materials that they had taken out for scrap materials that Oz had ensured to have brought first. It had turned out that they had been taking these scraps to help out Ofelia Ortiz and her family make their home a better place. Dennis gave them all the weekend to complete their moonlighting so that way after the weekend the British Embassy, would have never caught wind of it as he would not tell them and nor would he tell Gary. Gary Turnbull finds out about Prima Ballerina Ofelia Ortiz seeing Oz fromPru-Scott Johns. After Dennis left the prison that Barry was in after he visited him he met Gary Turnbull outside the prison, as he informed him that the Cuban press were unhappy about the pairs relationship, as he told Dennis that he must inform Oz that he must break it off with her.

characters.name: Gary Turnbull
characters.description: Gary Turnbull Gary Turnbull (Clive Russell) was man who gave work assignments within the British Embassy. Gary Turnbull wanted the troubles withEvan Traskerand the lads having their issues and difficulties with him, to be over quite quickly. He seemed to take over Traskers role due to this, asDennisand the lads got on far better with him it had seemed. Gary Turnbull asked the Dennis if he and the lads could collect a bath tub one Saturday, Dennis agreed for them all. An argument came about as the lads were worried it would occur during the evening that many of them had plans for, asOzwas going to seeOfelia Ortizin a ballet show,Wymanwas going snorkelling with the british embassy workforce, andNevillewas on a mission thatTarquin Pearceassigned him. Dennis assured the lads that they would be back by the evening, and it was a daytime job. He informed them that by that point they had to take any sort of work that they could be get and be grateful for it. The work that was being completed on a house refurbishment was being done too slowly so Gary warned Dennis that they had to speed up their work processes or they could see themselves fired and a new team of workers bought in. Gary and Dennis go through the inventory and then they later found out that Oz,Bomber, andBarryhad been moonlighting the old materials that they had taken out for scrap materials that Oz had ensured to have brought first. It had turned out that they had been taking these scraps to help out Ofelia Ortiz and her family make their home a better place. Dennis gave them all the weekend to complete their moonlighting so that way after the weekend the British Embassy, would have never caught wind of it as he would not tell them and nor would he tell Gary. Gary Turnbull finds out about Prima Ballerina Ofelia Ortiz seeing Oz fromPru-Scott Johns. After Dennis left the prison that Barry was in after he visited him he met Gary Turnbull outside the prison, as he informed him that the Cuban press were unhappy about the pairs relationship, as he told Dennis that he must inform Oz that he must break it off with her.

characters.name: Grainger's fan
characters.description: Grainger's fan (Madeleine Moffat) appeared in an episode of series two. She had a magazine or something of the sort that had contained the corrupt ex-con MP, or was written by him.Jeffrey Graingersigned it, as his secretarySarahseemed annoyed at him for signing whatever it was that he had signed in broad daylight in the middle of a train station. She knew that he should be focusing on whether he would sell the Middlesborough Transporter Bridge toOzand the lads or not. He informed her that he had to sign the things of his fans if they asked, or something along those lines.

characters.name: Harry Blackburn
characters.description: Harry Blackburn (Kevin Lloyd) was both a plumber and a country & Western Enthusiast. He was responsible for the plumbing on the Thornley Manor project. He always dressed in cowboy gear, and he was also known for driving a Nissan Patrole.

characters.name: Hazel Redfern
characters.description: Hazel Taylor (Melanie Hill) was the first wife ofBarry. She spoke toWaynesaying she felt she knew him through Barry, and needed time to think about marrying him, but could not tell him so asked Wayne to do so for her. Barry first renovated a house for the pair to move into, with his assistant namedTrevor, and then the later the help of the magnificent seven. Barry would often return home, and her words would be that she was still thinking about it.  She often found Barry boring, only ever going on about the antics of both him and the magnificent seven, and his work,as time went on. She later went to Spain for a funeral of sorts. She then began drinking and gambling. Later Barry proposed to his wife, asDennisaskedAlly Fraserto give them all a day of for the wedding. Hazel believed that they were only getting married by boat, not escaping Spain and Ally too.  In later years the pair divorced, as Barry had a new wife the Romanian womanTatiana. Hazel appears again in Au Revoir, Pet (now played byLucy Bayler) at the start were the lads were still working for the British Embassy, however to begin with in an unnamed city in the middle of Africa. The embassy comes under siege from the African locals, as the staff begin evacuation preparations and proceedings.  In the meantime Hazel appears in this city having sex withOz, as he later gets injured by the backlash of some shrapnel from an explosion hitting or going into his bum.

characters.name: Heidi
characters.description: Heidi (Oona Kirsch) was a character in series one. She wasWayne'slongest conquest out in Düsseldorf as his time with her managed to span two episodes. Usually Wayne's conquests would only go along in Düsseldorf for one episode whenever he met a woman that he chatted up there.

characters.name: Helmut Fischer
characters.description: Helmut Fischer (Lex Van Delden) was a carpenter in Düsseldorf. He was a friend ofNeville'son the construction site. He invited him to his house to stay one evening. He was one of the German workers and site bosses that Neville got on extremely well with, which what often irritate his xenophobic friendOz.

characters.name: Herr Grunwald
characters.description: Herr Grunwald Herr Grunwald (Michael Sheard) was much likeHerr Ulrichthey were site bosses who were side characters that never had anything much to do with the main storylines. Herr Grunwald got blackmailed byDennisto send the bruiserMcGowanhome from Germany, afterOzput him up in their hut because he had been kicked out of the hostel he was staying in under the grounds of assaulting the staff. Herr Grunwald fired McGowan as Dennis thanked Herr Grunwald for firing him, although he did not depart quietly, as he stoleMoxey'sdartboard as he left. He was also spotted by the lads in an Adult Cinema in Düsseldorf as they had believed thatNevillehad been going there to watch adult films, whereas in reality he had been having guitar lessons in a building just next door to the Cinema.

characters.name: Herr Grunwald
characters.description: Herr Grunwald Herr Grunwald (Michael Sheard) was much likeHerr Ulrichthey were site bosses who were side characters that never had anything much to do with the main storylines. Herr Grunwald got blackmailed byDennisto send the bruiserMcGowanhome from Germany, afterOzput him up in their hut because he had been kicked out of the hostel he was staying in under the grounds of assaulting the staff. Herr Grunwald fired McGowan as Dennis thanked Herr Grunwald for firing him, although he did not depart quietly, as he stoleMoxey'sdartboard as he left. He was also spotted by the lads in an Adult Cinema in Düsseldorf as they had believed thatNevillehad been going there to watch adult films, whereas in reality he had been having guitar lessons in a building just next door to the Cinema.

characters.name: Herr Pfister
characters.description: Herr Pfister (Heinz Bernard) was the agent who hired the Brits to work out in Germany. He is seen in the third episode of the first series as he arrives in Germany late with the first set of wages for the lads, and potentially hadMcGowanin tow atop of this.

characters.name: Herr Ulrich
characters.description: Herr Ulrich (Peter Birch) was one of the site bosses. He refused to giveNevillework originally, later he hires him after firingOzfor hostile behaviour. This caused ripples between the pair before he ultimately decided to hire them both and have all of the group nicknamed the "magnificent seven" to work under him, thus formulating the group.

characters.name: Howard Radcliffe
characters.description: Howard Radcliffe (John Bowler) was the main architect on the Thornley Manor refuebishment project. He wanted to cut corners onAlly Fraser'sorders, he constantly appeared at the site of the refurbishment. He later got more funding from Ally Fraser after the strike of the magnificent seven was over, they had gotten what they wanted from Ally. Ally put more funding towards the project, as they also raised some more to get the refurbishments done perfectly, with no corners cut.

characters.name: Irena
characters.description: Irena (Zelda Tinska) was the sister ofDhori.  She was a young woman who was brought into the country illegally with her two brothers and several others illegal immigrants. She got herself separated from her brothers byMickey Startupwho wanted her to work in his brothel. She escaped the brothel to search for her brothers who were working on the demolition of the bridge, so that it could be rebuilt and sold elsewhere.

characters.name: Jean
characters.description: Jean (Denise Welch) was a woman within the couple that had bought Marjorie's old house in the episodeMarjorie doesn't live here anymore. Jean was sat on the couch with her husbandDouglas, asBomber,Oz, andMoxey, andWayneall came into the house. Douglas asked Oz how the trio got in as he informed him that he had a spare key as he and his ex wife by that point Marjorie live there. Douglas informed Oz that Marjorie no longer lives there and has moved out.Barrylater heads for the house after making it to Newcastle later than the other lads. Barry knocked on the door as Douglas answered it, he informs Barry that Marjorie has moved away from that house. Barry says that he has nowhere to stay as Douglas practically tells him that he isn't staying there as he throws him and his bags out of the door. Barry then goes and stays withNevilleandBrendalike Wayne had done. As Oz, Bomber, and Moxey all went to stay withDennis,Christine, andNorma.

characters.name: Jeffery Grainger
characters.description: Jeffery Grainger Jeffery Grainger (Bill Nighy) was a corrupt politician whomOzmet when he was imprisoned. He was the one that Oz had to pay for the Middlesborough Transporter Bridge project. He had a secretary namedSarah, whom Oz had a fling with. The lads later found out that they had to buy the bridge from Jeffery. They each had to raise ten grand to give him to start the project, whichDennisstruggled to do, he lost his money from taking downAlly Fraserdue to two wives and two divorces, over the course of twelve years. Dennis was now a struggling taxi driver, who's biggest pay was carting around a drug dealer, exclusively on a Tuesday, and a Friday. Oz often had to meet Jeffery for the project. Jeffery's secretary Sarah, had managed to persuade him to let the lads buy the bridge before they went to Native America. Dennis later went to Britain to fly out to see Jeffery as the core of the bridge was missing. Jeffery remarked he had thought it would have been Oz that went to the meeting, and had said that his secretary Sarah was looking forward to seeing Oz again, he was suspicious however of something going on between the two of them behind his back. Dennis informed him about the deal having some paid up front, and getting the remainder after putting up the bridge over the Grand Canyon. Jeffery remarked that he did not like deals like those himself, as upon the comments that Jeffery made, Dennis had concluded the meeting.

characters.name: Joe Saugus
characters.description: Joe Saugus (Gordon Tootoosis) was a minor yet important character from Auf wiedersehen, pet. The show restarts with Joe meditating over the Grand Canyon, before there is a cut to the Angel of the north just before we see what the lads were doing by 2002. Joe appeared for the first time during the end credits of the second episode of the third series. UponOzplacing an advert for the Middlesborough Transporter Bridge on the Internet, he had hoped someone would come. He confided this information inDennisas he believed Oz was nuts for doing this and remarked 'what did you put on it bridge for sale!' Joe later showed up in Middlesborough for the bridge, however the magnificent seven had to buy it to sell it for a huge profit. Joe used sand and a stick to show that the Native Americans in his eyes needed a quicker way to and from their casinos, rather than the highway, as he believed a bridge was necessary. Joe seemed to save Barry from a near death experience at the hands ofTatiana'sloverKadi. Joe sent the group to Native America on a plane, as he showed them that he would like it placed over The Grand Canyon. The magnificent seven now accompanied byWaynessonWymandue to Wayne's death, went by plane to Native America. Joe informed the seven upon arrest for taking drugs into Native America that they may not be able to get out, which later was not the case, due to the lads getting some aid with getting themselves bail fromGary Hathaway. Joe took the seven to a ritual dance, as Oz went and taught a Native American child the Hockey Cockey.  He also had a son namedChip Sauguswho helped the lads move the Middlesborough Transporter Bridge over the Grand Canyon. He also visited the site of Wyman's broken truck, and noticed Wyman gone. As night fell Joe decided that it was time to conclude their search for Wyman for the night. He agreed it through with the lads that they would continue their search in the morning. Joe was happy to see his son after another days wait, as he had come to do the steelwork on the bridge. Joe thanked the lads for everything that they had done for the Native Americans, just before their departure.

characters.name: Kadi
characters.description: Kadi (Dragan Mićanović) was originally introduced asTatiana'sbrother, andBarry'sstep brother. He often wanted Barry to be quiet as he stayed over to watch Television. Kadi would appear at or nearby the dates of Tatiana and Barry. Barry took a couple of the lads to watch Kadi at a garage one evening, on a stake out and found out that he was selling illegal drugs. He is later revealed to be Tatiana's lover, asOzsees the pair kissing but does not tell Barry. Barry found out from Oz andDennisafter he grew suspicious of Kadi. Kadi and Tatiana later planned to kill Barry. Kadi took him to a tree, as he is about to kill him, or kidnap him and then kill him.Joe Saugusstopped him doing this however. With the help of the lads Barry gets Kadi out of his life, or at least believes to have done so. Kadi planted drugs on Barry so that officials in Native America, would believe that he was smuggling drugs into the country. Barry got himself stuck in Native America due to this. Barry later met a British Policeman,Andy Hateley, who had informedMoxeythat information that he had dug up and found aboutMickey Startuphad helped nail him, the police were no longer on his tail, and nor with the Liverpudlian police. Barry pleaded with the policeman to arrest him earlier in the day, as he wanted to be arrested for mistakenly smuggling the drugs. The policeman later got a phone call whilst in a bar with Barry in Native America, he informed him that Kadi had been arrested, and the lightest sentance he will get is if he pleaded guilty, and confessed to everything. Barry asked the policeman if he was including the drug plant on him, the policemen assured him that this would also be part of all of his crimes.
